Off Calendar Mar-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant FRED RUSSELL'S Motion To Compel Deposition Testimony Of Lavilina Adviento And Response To Request For Documents is granted. Lavilina Advento is ordered to appear for her deposition, to be noticed by Defendant, and to be completed no later than March 29, 2007. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are denied as the declaration accompanying the motion does not set forth facts supporting the amount of any monetary sanction being sought. [C.C.P. Section 2023.040]. COMM: EVERETT A.
